aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Impulsive surge

💼 Career: Jaldi decision lene ki tendency mistake karwa sakti hai, pause lena better hoga

❤️ Love: React karne se pehle samajhna zaruri hai

💰 Money: Risky step avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Think before acting

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum speed me clarity lose kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Steady grounding

💼 Career: Tumhara patience ek strong progress create karega

❤️ Love: Stability aur comfort secure feel karayega

💰 Money: Gradual gain strong hai

🧘 Advice: Stay consistent

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par tumhara base strongest hota hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Restless thoughts

💼 Career: Multiple ideas se confusion ho sakta hai, ek direction choose karo

❤️ Love: Mixed signals misunderstanding create karenge

💰 Money: Careless planning avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Simplify choices

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum clarity tab paate ho jab tum limit karte ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer
